overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand Gothic dining hall from a video game, featuring floating candles, tall stained glass windows, and numerous characters in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. Warm sunlight streams through the windows creating dramatic god rays across the stone floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand Gothic dining hall with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from a fixed position at the back of the hall

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass windows spanning the left wall, casting colored light patterns
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air beneath the high ceiling
long wooden house tables set with plates and food, running lengthwise through the hall
Gothic stone arches and columns along the right wall supporting the vaulted ceiling
polished stone tile floor reflecting the warm sunlight and candlelight

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand Gothic dining hall filled with students seated at long wooden tables. Warm morning light streams through tall stained glass windows on the left, while hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space from above. The stone architecture features high vaulted ceilings and ornate arches, creating an atmosphere of historic grandeur typical of a magical school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand Gothic dining hall that emphasizes a sense of historic grandeur and magical atmosphere. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where students are seated at long wooden tables beneath high vaulted ceilings and ornate arches. As the eye moves across the space, warm morning light streams through tall stained glass windows on the left, casting dramatic rays across the stone architecture. The scene is further illuminated from above by hundreds of floating candles that drift through the air, completing the immersive environment of a magical school.
